data.title: Data breach at Precision Endodontics of Raleigh: email account accessed on June 10, 2025; phishing emails sent to small part of contact list.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, the dental clinic Precision Endodontics recently found out on June 10, 2025, that its email system was breached by an unidentified individual. This breach led to phishing emails being sent to a fraction of its former contacts. Furthermore, the compromised contact list contained names of approximately [insert number] individuals.
Apollo Files For $500 Million, 5.15% Senior Notes Due 2035 – SEC Filing

data.title: Nuvia Dental Implant Center to open 7 new locations across the US in second half of 2025, including Harrison, NY in September.
data.description: In August 7, 2025, in Salt Lake City, the Nuvia Dental Implant Center announced plans to enhance availability of its complete arch dental implant procedure by launching seven additional facilities throughout the United States in the latter part of 2025. These new locations are set to open in various cities such as Harrison, NY in September, increasing the total reach of the dental implant treatment offered.

data.title: Analysts predict 'billions' to flow into Bitcoin, Ethereum due to Trump's 401K order.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% this year, higher than the initial forecast of 4.9%. This growth is largely attributed to the rapid recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic, with various industries showing significant improvement. In particular, the manufacturing sector is expected to expand by 7.8%, while the services sector is forecasted to grow by 5.1%. Additionally, global trade is expected to increase by 9.7% this year. The report also mentions that inflation rates are on the rise, with an estimated global average of 3.2% for this year. Overall, the outlook for the global economy appears to be positive, with strong growth expected in various sectors.
Friday FX Options Expiries

data.title: One Equity Partners to invest in Brown & Root Industrial Services, agreement reached in New York.
data.description: In New York, private equity firm One Equity Partners recently announced their plan to invest in Brown & Root Industrial Services. This agreement signifies a significant move in the industrial services sector, with the deal set to inject a substantial amount of funding into the company. While specific numbers were not disclosed, the investment is expected to have a notable impact on Brown & Root Industrial Services' operations and growth trajectory.

data.title: CCIAP announced 5 trade shows for 2026 to take place from March 10–12 at Panama Convention Center, boosting regional growth.
data.description: In Panama City on August 7, 2025, the Chamber of Commerce, Industries, and Agriculture of Panama (CCIAP) declared its lineup of five upcoming international trade exhibitions for 2026. The shows are set to occur from March 10–12 at the Panama Convention Center. These specialized events will offer a platform for showcasing various industries and fostering global business connections.

data.title: Oak Valley Community Bank hired Matthew Brown as VP, Commercial Banking Officer for upcoming Lodi Branch.
data.description: Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), based in Oakdale, Calif., recently welcomed Matthew Brown as Vice President, Commercial Banking Officer. Brown will work at the new Lodi Branch at 31 South School Street, set to open this autumn.

data.title: New pill in trial by Eli Lilly results in significant weight loss. Company aims for FDA approval by year-end for orforglipron.
data.description: The company announced its intention to pursue FDA approval for its drug, orforglipron, by the year's end.

data.title: Novo Nordisk, the once top European company, suffered setbacks leading to loss in value, according to analysts.
data.description: A leading pharmaceutical company based in Denmark, which was previously the most valuable company in Europe, has experienced a decline in its financial performance due to a series of errors, according to analysts. The company's stock value and market capitalization have seen a significant decrease as a result of these missteps.

data.title: Sydney Sweeney's ad campaign faced right-wing criticism, despite initial lack of widespread disapproval.
data.description: Initially, right-wing commentators claimed that Ms. Sweeney faced significant backlash following the launch of her latest ad campaign. However, there was actually no widespread criticism directed towards her, at least in the initial stages.

data.title: Promising addiction treatment stifled by bureaucratic barriers & profit-driven actions, leaving many patients without potentially life-saving medication.
data.description: Bureaucratic obstacles within the political system and a pharmaceutical company prioritizing financial gain were cited as reasons for restricting the availability of a drug that experts claim could have significantly decreased the impact of the opioid crisis. Experts believe that the drug could have potentially saved countless lives and reduced the toll of the epidemic, which has resulted in thousands of deaths and affected numerous individuals and communities across the country. Frustration has been expressed at the missed opportunity to make a substantial positive impact in combating the crisis due to regulatory barriers and profit motives hindering access to the potentially life-saving medication.

data.title: Delta left 282 passengers stranded at a remote Azores airport post emergency landing due to engine trouble mid-Atlantic.
data.description: After experiencing engine issues over the Atlantic, a flight carrying 282 passengers from Madrid to New York was diverted to a small, isolated airport. The stranded passengers were left uncertain about the next steps in their journey.

data.title: Japanese car manufacturers anticipate significant profit losses despite the recent trade deal cutting auto tariffs to 15%.
data.description: Three leading Japanese automakers, Toyota, Honda, and Nissan, are anticipating significant decreases in their profits even with a trade agreement that lowered auto tariffs to 15 percent. However, the implementation of this reduced rate is still pending.

data.title: Trive Capital in Dallas announced multiple promotions within team members, effective July 1, 2025, including Tanner Cope, Andrew Frank, Joe McDougall, and Brad Wiginton.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, Trive Capital, a private equity firm in Dallas, officially declared the promotions of four key members of its team, which took effect on July 1, 2025. Tanner Cope, Andrew Frank, Joe McDougall, and Brad Wiginton have been elevated to new positions within the firm. This initiative serves as a testament to Trive's commitment to recognizing and rewarding its employees for their hard work and dedication. Join us in congratulating these individuals on their well-deserved achievements.

data.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc. stock falls due to pain data results; VX-993 doesn't show significant improvement, not expected to advance monotherapy.
data.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc.'s stock (NASDAQ: VRTX) is declining following disappointing pain data from the Phase 2 study of VX-993, the company's selective NaV1.8 pain signal inhibitor, for acute pain after bunionectomy surgery. The data did not show statistically significant improvement on the primary endpoint compared to placebo. Vertex's chief medical officer mentioned that VX-993 is not expected to be superior to existing NaV1.8 inhibitors, leading to halting its advancement in acute pain treatment. The full article can be read on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BioMarin's Q2 earnings soar to $1.44, up 50% YoY, surpassing consensus; sales hit $825.41M, 20% YoY growth in Voxzogo revenue from new patients driving growth. BMN 390 for PKU discontinued, BMN 333 advances to 2030.
data.description: Biomarin Pharmaceutical Inc. reported strong second-quarter results with adjusted earnings of $1.44, a 50% increase from the previous year, exceeding the consensus of 85 cents. Sales reached $825.41 million, up 16% from the prior year and surpassing the consensus of $760.39 million. The growth was fueled by a 20% increase in Voxzogo revenue from new patients initiating therapy globally, primarily in the U.S. with a focus on the 0-4 age group. Revenues from Enzyme Therapies like Aldurazyme and Vimizi rose by 15%, attributed to increased patient demand and government orders, though Kuvan product revenues decreased due to generic competition. The firm is optimistic about BMN 390, a preclinical candidate for phenylketonuria.

data.title: Firefly Aerospace soars after IPO, Rocket Lab eases pre-earnings. Kratos Defense also mentioned. Investors monitoring closely.
data.description: Share prices of Firefly Aerospace surged following its initial public offering on Thursday. Rocket Lab and Kratos Defense experienced declines as they prepared to release their earnings reports. Firefly Aerospace witnessed a significant increase in value, while Rocket Lab and Kratos Defense saw a decrease in their stock prices ahead of their upcoming financial results.

data.title: Alaska Air Group stock receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade on improving technical performance, future outlook uncertain.
data.description: Alaska Air Group has seen a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. Investors are now wondering whether this positive momentum will persist.
